description: Live device session 2026-04-29 10:16 (#116). Supermarket checkout area, locked on a person at a register. Recorded at 120fps (slow-motion mode), 362 frames = 3s real-time. Live session showed 3 reacqs across 155 engine-processed frames over ~12s real-clock — the source video covers only the first portion. Diagnostic test for the same single-person cascade-scoring failure mode as walking_outdoor.
